required_outcome: Return discoverable standards candidates and promotion target fields for the requested scope.
guardrails: Treat discovery results as advisory candidates, not automatic promotions.
Use explicit scope-path input and avoid scanning hidden implicit roots.
Do not execute promote automatically after discovery.
decision_rules: When focus is absent, omit the flag instead of guessing a topic.
Stop after reporting candidate promotion targets.
workflow_steps: Propose and run runectx standard discover.
Report candidate promotion targets and diagnostics.
End flow without chaining promote automatically.
stop_condition: Stop after discovery output is summarized and candidate targets are listed.

examples.scenario: Discover standards in a focused area
examples.user_prompt: Discover standards for adapter workflow generation under tools/syncadapters.
examples.assistant_response: I will run `runectx standard discover --scope-path tools/syncadapters --focus adapter-workflow` and report candidate targets only.
